name: Weekly GA4 Analytics Report For Website/App

nodes.name: GA4 - New vs Returning Previous Week

parameters.content:
## 📊 Weekly GA4 Business Intelligence Report

Automatically runs **every Monday at 8:00 AM** and delivers a fully formatted HTML performance report to stakeholders via email.

**What this workflow does:**
- Fetches 14 separate reports from Google Analytics 4 (Current & Previous week data for 7 key metrics)
- Generates an AI executive summary analyzing Week-over-Week (WoW) trends using Gemini
- Calculates WoW % changes for ALL metrics (Overview, Pages, Referrals, Events, Countries, Devices, New vs Returning)
- Builds a premium HTML email and delivers it via Gmail/SMTP

**Before using this template:**
1. Set your GA4 Property ID in all 14 GA4 nodes
2. Connect your Google Analytics OAuth2 credential
3. Connect your Gemini API credential
4. Connect your Gmail / SMTP credential
5. Set your recipient email(s) in the Email node or Code node
6. Set your timezone in workflow settings

## 📡 Google Analytics 4 — Data Nodes

Fetches data for 7 key categories, running both **Current Week** and **Previous Week** nodes to generate deep Week-over-Week (WoW) comparisons.

**⚠️ Required: Set your Property ID**
Open each of the 14 nodes → Property ID field → replace {YOUR_PROPERTY_ID} with your GA4 numeric property ID.
Found at: GA4 Admin → Property Settings → Property ID

**Node breakdown (Each has a Current & Previous week version):**
- **Overview** — totals for sessions, users, bounce rate, etc.
- **Top 5 Pages** — screens/pages by views
- **Top 5 Referrals** — traffic sources by sessions
- **Top 5 Events** — user interactions by count
- **Top 5 Countries** — geographic breakdown by sessions
- **Device Breakdown** — mobile / desktop / tablet split
- **New vs Returning** — audience loyalty breakdown

**All nodes have Execute Once = ON** to prevent duplicate rows.

## ⏰ Schedule Trigger

Fires every **Monday at 8:00 AM IST**.








**To change timezone or time:**
Open workflow settings → change the Timezone to your preferred one.

Default timezone: Your Local Timezone

## 🔀 Merge

Waits for **all GA4 data chains (14 nodes total)** to complete before passing data forward.

Without this node, Gemini and Code nodes could trigger before all GA4 data is ready - causing empty or undefined values in the report.

Mode: Combine by Position

## 🤖 Gemini — AI Executive Summary

Generates a **3-paragraph executive summary** covering overall performance, audience behaviour, and actionable recommendations. It analyzes the full Week-over-Week dataset from all 14 GA4 nodes to spot trends.

**Credential required:** Google Gemini API
Get your key at: aistudio.google.com

**Model:** gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview

If Gemini fails or returns empty, the report still sends normally — the AI section is hidden from the email automatically.

## 🧮 Code Node — Data Processing + Email Builder

Does 4 things:
1. Pulls data from all 14 GA4 nodes and Gemini by node name.
2. Calculates week-over-week % changes for **every single section** (Overview, Pages, Sources, Events, Countries, Devices, New vs Returning).
3. Builds the full HTML email with inline CSS and alignment fixes.
4. Outputs subject, html, and recipients for the Email node.

**To change recipients:**
Find `recipients:` near the bottom of the code → update the email address.
Multiple: `'email1@gmail.com,email2@gmail.com'`












**To change client name in footer:**
Find `AppStoneLab Technologies` in the HTML and replace with your client's brand name.
